CreateAPeerToPeerConnection.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
CreateAPeerToPeerConnection.bandwidthInMbps: Bandwidth of the peer-to-peer connection in Mbps
CreateAPeerToPeerConnection.peerAccountId: Peer account ID, required only when creating a cross-account peer-to-peer connection
CreateAPeerToPeerConnection.peerVpcId: ID of the peer VPC for the peer-to-peer connection
CreateAPeerToPeerConnection.peerRegion: Region of the peer end of the peer-to-peer connection
CreateAPeerToPeerConnection.peerIfName: Interface name of the peer end; only configurable for same-account peer-to-peer connections
CreateAPeerToPeerConnection.billing.paymentTiming: Payment timing: Prepaid or Postpaid. Required when creating an order; not required for renewal orders
CreateAPeerToPeerConnection.billing.reservation: Reservation details. Not required for Postpaid; required for Prepaid
CreateAPeerToPeerConnection.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to be created
CreateAPeerToPeerConnection.tags.tagKey: Tag key, supporting uppercase and lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /., with a length of 1–65
CreateAPeerToPeerConnection.tags.tagValue: Tag value, supporting uppercase and lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /., with a length of 0–65
CreateAPeerToPeerConnection.deleteProtect: Whether to enable deletion protection. Defaults to false, meaning deletion is allowed
